'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 110''' is the one hundred tenth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[February 4]], [[2004]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*The rise of [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]]
*[[Even Piell/Legends|Even Piell]]
*[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]
*[[Ysanne Isard]]
*[[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]
*[[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] - wildlife
*The [[Commerce Guild/Legends|Commerce Guild]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]]
*[[:Category:Clothing|Garments and couture]]
*Hover chair
